title: wedelia bonplandiana
intro: Wedelia bonplandiana, also known as Flor de Mayo or Mexican Plantain, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America, belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wedelia bonplandiana include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis. Wedelia bonplandiana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
